projectDescription: A browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, and Chromium-based browsers that enables users to manage Ethereum accounts and interact with decentralized applications.
keyFeatures: Multi-network Ethereum wallet supporting Mainnet, testnets, and custom EVM-compatible networks
MetaMask Snaps extensibility platform for adding new features via sandboxed plugins
Hardware wallet support (Ledger, Trezor, Lattice, Keystone)
Multi-account management with HD keyring and seed phrase recovery
DApp connection management with fine-grained permission controls (EIP-2255)
Token detection, NFT support, and asset management across networks
Built-in token swap and bridge functionality
LavaMoat supply chain security for runtime isolation of dependencies
Manifest V3 (Chrome) and Manifest V2 (Firefox) support
Phishing and PPOM (Privacy-Preserving On-chain Message) protection
publicApiSurface: ethereum.request({ method: 'eth_requestAccounts' }) — connect and request user accounts
ethereum.request({ method: 'wallet_addEthereumChain' }) — add a custom network
ethereum.request({ method: 'wallet_watchAsset' }) — watch a token asset
ethereum.on('accountsChanged', handler) — subscribe to account changes
ethereum.on('chainChanged', handler) — subscribe to network changes
MetaMask Snaps API — extend MetaMask with custom Snap plugins
